Sports & Entertainment

Stadium and arena WiFi that turns a sell-out crowd into a connected audience.

Stadiums, arenas, and music venues need WiFi that handles tens of thousands of simultaneous fans on match day or gig night, captures opted-in fan data for CRM and sponsorship, and keeps staff, POS, and production running on a separate, reliable network.

High-density guest WiFi engineered for capacity crowds
Fan data captured on connection to power CRM, loyalty, and sponsorship
A secure, separate network for staff, POS, and production
The conversation

What your customer is dealing with right now.

Network congestion the moment the gates open

Tens of thousands of fans connecting at once can bring a normal network to its knees. Purple is built for high-density venues, so concourses and seating bowls stay connected from kickoff to the final whistle.

Match-day footfall that never becomes a contact

Every fan who logs in becomes a known, opted-in contact. Purple captures fan data on connection and segments it straight into the CRM and loyalty program, giving sponsors a measurable, brandable touchpoint.

Staff, POS, and production can't share a fan's network

Point-of-sale, ticketing, and operational communications need reliable performance separate from the public network. Staff WiFi keeps venue operations running even when the concourse is at capacity.

Where Purple fits

The products that solve it.

GUEST WIFI
Turn match-day fans into a marketing database

Branded captive portal or seamless connection via the Purple app, with fan data captured on every login and segmented straight into CRM and sponsorship activations.

Branded captive portal or seamless connection
STAFF WIFI
Reliable connectivity for every gate and concession

A secure, separate network for staff, POS, and production, so operations keep running at full capacity without touching the fan network.

Works with Entra ID, Google & Okta

Minnesota United FC used Purple to capture fan data at one of Allianz Field's highest-attended matches.

Deployed in time for a sold-out match against Inter Miami CF, Purple's Capture Guest WiFi fed opted-in fan data straight into MNUFC's existing database, giving the club's digital and BI teams a blueprint for more personalized offers and ticket promotions. "It's a smart way to build fan loyalty one WiFi connection at a time," said Evan Entler, VP of Digital Media at MNUFC.

750m
fans/yr in the US
80%
use phones during a game
25%
of venues offer public WiFi
Marketing support

Need co-branded materials for sports & entertainment?

Request sector-specific campaign packs, one-pagers, and co-branded assets for sports & entertainment deals, including Purple app collateral you can hand straight to a prospect.

Ready to add Purple to your portfolio?

Join 80,000+ venues already running on Purple. No targets, no minimums, just bigger deals.
